stemHtml: An aircraft with a maximum take-off mass of 250 000 kg experiences an engine failure just after take-off. The crew must return to the airport, but the aircraft is heavier than the maximum landing weight. When ATC asks why fuel needs to be jettisoned, the correct explanation is…

options.a: To reduce aircraft weight to maximum landing weight for structural integrity.
options.b: To reduce fire risk during emergency landing.
options.c: To increase glide distance in case of total power loss.
options.d: To comply with noise abatement procedures for overweight landings.
